brief_notes: Well-structured computational neuroscience modeling paper (hippocampal CA3). Parameters verified: a_DG=0.005, a_MF=0.02, a_PP=0.2, l_DG=205, l_MF=8, l_PP=205, ρ_EC=0.15, ρ_DG=0.02, ρ_MF=0.01, ρ_PP=0.09, 10% sparsity, 99.9% accuracy target. 5 figures. 7255 words - one of the longer orchestrated papers. Good theoretical grounding and detailed methods.
